; Alessio Faraci (https://github.com/alefaraci)
; Selection-menu button recipe from rmitchellscott's tocFromSelection.qmd; cross-doc + .rm-storage patterns from betterToc (GPL-3.0-only): https://github.com/rmitchellscott/xovi-qmd-extensions
; SPDX-License-Identifier: GPL-3.0-only
; Modified: 2026-06-21
;
; Requires: https://github.com/asivery/rm-xovi-extensions

AFFECT [[11806562588218124596]]
	TRAVERSE ?#[[6504254477]]
	LOCATE AFTER ALL
	INSERT {
		readonly property string regRmHeader: "reMarkable .lines file, version=6          "
		property var regLinks: []
		property string regCurKey: (~&6504254477&~.document ? ~&6504254477&~.document.idForPage(~&6504254477&~.page) : "")
		property int regSeq: 0
		property bool regArmed: false
		property real regPendingSx: 0
		property real regPendingSy: 0
		property string regPickSource: ""
		property int regPickSourceNum: 0
		property string regReturnTo: ""
		property string regConfirmText: ""
		property string regMenuId: ""
		property string regEditId: ""
		property bool regCrossActive: false
		property bool regCrossReady: false
		property int regReloadToken: 0
		property string regCrossSrcDocId: ""
		property int regCrossSrcPageNum: 0
		property string regCrossSrcKey: ""
		property real regCrossSrcSx: 0
		property real regCrossSrcSy: 0
		property string regDialogTitle: ""
		property string regDialogMsg: ""
		property string regDialogLinkId: ""
		property string regBackText: ""
		property var regBackTarget: null
		property var regJumpPending: null
		property int regJumpTries: 0

		function regDocId() {
			return (~&6504254477&~.document && ~&6504254477&~.document.id) ? ~&6504254477&~.document.id : "";
		}
		function regFilePath() {
			var id = regDocId();
			if (!id) return "";
			return "file:///home/root/.local/share/remarkable/xochitl/" + id + "/rm-linkFromSelection.rm";
		}
		function regReload() {
			var path = regFilePath();
			if (!path) { ~&6504254477&~.regLinks = []; ~&6504254477&~.regSeq = 0; return; }
			~&6504254477&~.regReloadToken = ~&6504254477&~.regReloadToken + 1;
			var myToken = ~&6504254477&~.regReloadToken;
			var req = new XMLHttpRequest();
			req.open("GET", path);
			req.onreadystatechange = function() {
				if (req.readyState === XMLHttpRequest.DONE) {
					if (myToken !== ~&6504254477&~.regReloadToken) return;
					var arr = [];
					try {
						var t = req.responseText || "";
						var j = t.indexOf("[");
						if (j >= 0) arr = JSON.parse(t.substring(j));
					} catch (e) { arr = []; }
					~&6504254477&~.regLinks = Array.isArray(arr) ? arr : [];
					var mx = 0;
					for (var i = 0; i < ~&6504254477&~.regLinks.length; i++) {
						var n = parseInt(String(~&6504254477&~.regLinks[i].id).replace("L", ""), 10);
						if (!isNaN(n) && n > mx) mx = n;
					}
					~&6504254477&~.regSeq = mx;
					~&6504254477&~.regConsumeCrossPending();
				}
			};
			req.send();
		}
		function regPersist() {
			var path = regFilePath();
			if (!path) return;
			var req = new XMLHttpRequest();
			req.open("PUT", path);
			req.send(regRmHeader + JSON.stringify(~&6504254477&~.regLinks));
		}

		function regSetPick(v) {
			try { ~&254540341572282132&~.regLinkPickMode = v; }
			catch (e) {  }
		}
		function regFindLinkAt(page, sx, sy) {
			var tol = 5;
			for (var i = 0; i < regLinks.length; i++) {
				var l = regLinks[i];
				if (l.page === page && Math.abs(l.sx - sx) < tol && Math.abs(l.sy - sy) < tol)
					return l.id;
			}
			return "";
		}
		function regArmLink(sx, sy) {
			regEditId = regFindLinkAt(regCurKey, sx, sy);
			regPendingSx = sx;
			regPendingSy = sy;
			regPickSource = regCurKey;
			regPickSourceNum = ~&6504254477&~.page + 1;
			regArmed = true;
			regArmTimer.restart();
			regSelfCheckTimer.stop();
			regSetPick(true);
			~&6504254477&~.toolbar.~&6650786433440202278&~();
		}
		function regArmLinkCross(sx, sy, editId) {
			regDisarm();
			~&254540341572282132&~.regCrossPick = {
				srcDocId: regDocId(),
				srcPageKey: regCurKey,
				srcPageNum: ~&6504254477&~.page + 1,
				srcDocName: (~&6504254477&~.document ? ~&6504254477&~.document.~&505890565057603928&~ : ""),
				sx: sx,
				sy: sy,
				editId: editId ? editId : regFindLinkAt(regCurKey, sx, sy),
				phase: "browse",
				ts: new Date().getTime()
			};
			if (typeof ~&6504254477&~.closeGesture === "function") { ~&6504254477&~.closeGesture();  return; }
		}
		function regMaybeEnterCrossPick() {
			if (!~&6504254477&~.document) return;
			var p = ~&254540341572282132&~.regCrossPick;
			if (!p || p.phase !== "browse") return;
			if (p.ts && (new Date().getTime() - p.ts) > 120000) { ~&254540341572282132&~.regCrossPick = null;  return; }
			if (regDocId() === p.srcDocId) {
				~&254540341572282132&~.regCrossPick = null;
				regNotify("Cannot link a document to itself. Choose another");
				return;
			}
			regCrossSrcDocId = p.srcDocId;
			regCrossSrcPageNum = p.srcPageNum;
			regCrossSrcKey = p.srcPageKey;
			regCrossSrcSx = p.sx;
			regCrossSrcSy = p.sy;
			regCrossActive = true;
			regCrossReady = false;
			regCrossArmTimer.restart();
			~&254540341572282132&~.regCrossPick = {
				srcDocId: p.srcDocId, srcPageKey: p.srcPageKey, srcPageNum: p.srcPageNum,
				sx: p.sx, sy: p.sy, editId: p.editId, srcDocName: p.srcDocName, phase: "page"
			};
			~&6504254477&~.toolbar.~&6650786433440202278&~();
		}
		function regCommitCross() {
			if (!regCrossActive) return;
			if (!regCrossReady) { regCrossCommitTimer.restart(); return; }
			var tgt = regCurKey;
			if (!tgt || !regResolves(tgt)) {  return; }
			var p = ~&254540341572282132&~.regCrossPick;
			var tgtName = (~&6504254477&~.document ? ~&6504254477&~.document.~&505890565057603928&~ : "");
			var srcName = (p && p.srcDocName) ? p.srcDocName : "document";
			var msg = ((p && p.editId) ? "Re-linked " : "Linked ") + (tgtName || "document") + " to " + srcName;
			~&254540341572282132&~.regCrossPending = {
				srcDocId: regCrossSrcDocId,
				srcPageKey: regCrossSrcKey,
				sx: regCrossSrcSx,
				sy: regCrossSrcSy,
				editId: (p && p.editId) ? p.editId : "",
				targetDoc: regDocId(),
				targetDocName: tgtName,
				targetPageKey: tgt,
				notifMsg: msg
			};
			regCrossActive = false;
			regCrossReady = false;
			~&254540341572282132&~.regCrossPick = null;
			regNotify(msg);
			regCrossReturnTimer.restart();
		}
		function regCancelCross() {
			var srcDoc = regCrossSrcDocId;
			var srcNum = regCrossSrcPageNum;
			regCrossActive = false;
			regCrossReady = false;
			~&254540341572282132&~.regCrossPick = null;
			if (srcDoc) {
				var e = ~&233694067165438&~.~&8399431778896295215&~(srcDoc);
				if (e) ~&254540341572282132&~.~&9497240032101537789&~(e, srcNum - 1);
			}
		}
		function regConsumeCrossPending() {
			var c = ~&254540341572282132&~.regCrossPending;
			if (!c) return;
			if (c.srcDocId !== regDocId()) return;
			~&254540341572282132&~.regCrossPending = null;
			var matched = false;
			if (c.editId && c.editId !== "") {
				var eid = c.editId;
				regLinks = regLinks.map(function(l) {
					if (l.id !== eid) return l;
					matched = true;
					return { id: l.id, sx: l.sx, sy: l.sy, page: l.page, target: "", targetDoc: c.targetDoc, targetDocName: c.targetDocName, targetPageKey: c.targetPageKey };
				});
				if (matched) {
					regPersist();
					regReloadToken = regReloadToken + 1;
					regReturnTo = "";
					regReturnTimer.restart();
					return;
				}
			}
			regSeq = regSeq + 1;
			var id = "L" + regSeq;
			regLinks = regLinks.concat([{ id: id, sx: c.sx, sy: c.sy, page: c.srcPageKey, target: "", targetDoc: c.targetDoc, targetDocName: c.targetDocName, targetPageKey: c.targetPageKey }]);
			regPersist();
			regReloadToken = regReloadToken + 1;
			regReturnTo = "";
			regReturnTimer.restart();
		}
		function regGoToCross(link) {
			if (!link || !link.targetDoc) return;
			var e = ~&233694067165438&~.~&8399431778896295215&~(link.targetDoc);
			if (!e) { regShowDialog("Document not found", "The linked document has been deleted.", link.id); return; }
			if (e.~&7712810854541167&~) { regShowDialog("Document not downloaded", "Open it once on this device, then try again.", ""); return; }
			~&254540341572282132&~.regCrossJump = {
				targetPageKey: link.targetPageKey,
				linkId: link.id,
				back: { docId: regDocId(), pageKey: regCurKey, docName: (~&6504254477&~.document ? ~&6504254477&~.document.~&505890565057603928&~ : "") }
			};
			~&254540341572282132&~.~&9497240032101537789&~(e, 0);
		}
		function regConsumeCrossJump() {
			if (!~&6504254477&~.document) return;
			var j = ~&254540341572282132&~.regCrossJump;
			if (!j) return;
			~&254540341572282132&~.regCrossJump = null;
			regJumpPending = { key: j.targetPageKey, back: j.back, linkId: j.linkId };
			regJumpTries = 0;
			regJumpTimer.restart();
		}
		function regTryJump() {
			var j = regJumpPending;
			if (!j) return;
			if (!~&6504254477&~.document) { regJumpPending = null; return; }
			var idx = -1;
			try { idx = ~&6504254477&~.document.pageForId(j.key); } catch (e1) { idx = -1; }
			if (typeof idx === "number" && idx >= 0) {
				regJumpPending = null;
				try { ~&6504254477&~.openPage(idx, ~&14175747548438644067&~.~&10593835380864769165&~.~&7442916920529273295&~); }
				catch (e2) { ~&6504254477&~.goToPageId(j.key); }
				if (j.back) ~&6504254477&~.regShowBackNotif(j.back);
				return;
			}
			if ((~&6504254477&~.document.pageCount > 0) || regJumpTries >= 8) {
				regJumpPending = null;
				if (j.back && j.back.docId) {
					~&254540341572282132&~.regCrossError = { title: "Page not found", msg: "The linked page has been deleted.", linkId: j.linkId };
					~&254540341572282132&~.regCrossJump = { targetPageKey: j.back.pageKey, linkId: "", back: null };
					var be = ~&233694067165438&~.~&8399431778896295215&~(j.back.docId);
					if (be) ~&254540341572282132&~.~&9497240032101537789&~(be, 0);
				}
				return;
			}
			regJumpTries = regJumpTries + 1;
			regJumpTimer.restart();
		}
		function regShowDialog(title, msg, linkId) {
			regDialogTitle = title;
			regDialogMsg = msg;
			regDialogLinkId = linkId ? linkId : "";
		}
		function regConsumeCrossError() {
			if (!~&6504254477&~.document) return;
			var er = ~&254540341572282132&~.regCrossError;
			if (!er) return;
			~&254540341572282132&~.regCrossError = null;
			regShowDialog(er.title, er.msg, er.linkId);
		}
		function regShowBackNotif(back) {
			if (typeof ~&16765420033347753489&~ === "function") {
				try {
					~&16765420033347753489&~({
						~&233736549263054&~: "Linked from " + (back.docName || "document"),
						~&7082453764199&~: "Back",
						~&254542236275632405&~: function() {
							var e = ~&233694067165438&~.~&8399431778896295215&~(back.docId);
							if (e) { ~&254540341572282132&~.regCrossJump = { targetPageKey: back.pageKey, linkId: "", back: null }; ~&254540341572282132&~.~&9497240032101537789&~(e, 0); }
						}
					});
					return;
				} catch (e1) {  }
			}
			~&6504254477&~.regBackTarget = back;
			~&6504254477&~.regBackText = "Linked from " + (back.docName || "document");
			regBackTimer.restart();
		}
		function regNotify(message) {
			if (typeof ~&16765420033347753489&~ === "function") {
				try { ~&16765420033347753489&~({ ~&233736549263054&~: message });  return; }
				catch (e1) {  }
			}
			regConfirmText = message;
			regReturnTimer.restart();
		}
		function regCreateLink(tgt) {
			if (regEditId !== "") {
				var eid = regEditId;
				regLinks = regLinks.map(function(l) { return l.id === eid ? { id: l.id, sx: l.sx, sy: l.sy, page: l.page, target: tgt } : l; });
				regEditId = "";
				regPersist();
				return;
			}
			regSeq = regSeq + 1;
			var id = "L" + regSeq;
			regLinks = regLinks.concat([{ id: id, sx: regPendingSx, sy: regPendingSy, page: regPickSource, target: tgt }]);
			regPersist();
		}
		function regEditLink(id) {
			regMenuId = "";
			var lk = null;
			for (var i = 0; i < regLinks.length; i++) { if (regLinks[i].id === id) { lk = regLinks[i]; break; } }
			if (!lk) return;
			if (lk.targetDoc) {
				regArmLinkCross(lk.sx, lk.sy, id);
				return;
			}
			regArmLink(lk.sx, lk.sy);
			regEditId = id;
		}
		function regDeleteLink(id) {
			regMenuId = "";
			regLinks = regLinks.filter(function(l) { return l.id !== id; });
			regPersist();
		}
		function regCancelLink() {
			var src = regPickSource;
			regArmTimer.stop();
			regSelfCheckTimer.stop();
			regArmed = false;
			regPickSource = "";
			regEditId = "";
			regSetPick(false);
			if (src) regGoTo(src);
		}
		function regDisarm() {
			regArmTimer.stop();
			regSelfCheckTimer.stop();
			regArmed = false;
			regPickSource = "";
			regEditId = "";
			regMenuId = "";
			regCrossActive = false;
			regCrossReady = false;
			regSetPick(false);
		}

		function regResolves(key) {
			var d = ~&6504254477&~.document;
			if (!d || !key) return false;
			try {
				var i = d.pageForId(key);
				return (typeof i === "number" && i >= 0 && d.idForPage(i) === key);
			} catch (e) { return true; }
		}
		function regGoTo(key) {
			if (!key) return;
			var v = ~&6504254477&~;
			var d = v.document;
			if (!d || !regResolves(key)) return;
			var idx = -1;
			try { idx = d.pageForId(key); } catch (e) { idx = -1; }
			if (typeof idx === "number" && idx >= 0) {
				try { v.openPage(idx, ~&14175747548438644067&~.~&10593835380864769165&~.~&7442916920529273295&~);  return; }
				catch (e1) {  }
			}
			v.goToPageId(key);
		}
		onRegCurKeyChanged: {
			if (regArmed && regCurKey !== "" && regCurKey !== regPickSource && regResolves(regCurKey)) {
				var tgt = regCurKey;
				var src = regPickSource;
				var srcNum = regPickSourceNum;
				regCreateLink(tgt);
				regArmTimer.stop();
				regSelfCheckTimer.stop();
				regArmed = false;
				regPickSource = "";
				regSetPick(false);
				regReturnTo = src;
				regNotify("Linked page " + srcNum + " to page " + (~&6504254477&~.page + 1));
				regReturnTimer.restart();
			}
		}
		onDocumentChanged: { regDisarm(); regReload(); regMaybeEnterCrossPick(); regConsumeCrossJump(); regConsumeCrossError(); }
		Component.onCompleted: { regReload(); regMaybeEnterCrossPick(); regConsumeCrossJump(); regConsumeCrossError(); }

		Item {
			id: regLinkLayer
			parent: ~&6504254477&~.uiOverlay
			anchors.fill: parent
			z: 100000

				Connections {
					target: ~&254540341572282132&~
					onRegLinkPickModeChanged: {
						if (~&254540341572282132&~ && !~&254540341572282132&~.regLinkPickMode && ~&6504254477&~.regArmed)
							~&6504254477&~.regCancelLink();
					}
				}

				Connections {
					target: ~&254540341572282132&~
					onRegOverviewClosedChanged: {
						if (~&6504254477&~.regArmed) regSelfCheckTimer.restart();
					}
				}

				Timer {
					id: regSelfCheckTimer
					interval: 600
					repeat: false
					onTriggered: {
						if (~&6504254477&~.regArmed && ~&6504254477&~.regCurKey === ~&6504254477&~.regPickSource) {
							~&6504254477&~.regReturnTo = "";
							~&6504254477&~.regNotify("Cannot link a page to itself. Choose another");
							regReturnTimer.restart();
							~&6504254477&~.regDisarm();
						}
					}
				}

				Timer {
					id: regArmTimer
					interval: 30000
					repeat: false
					onTriggered: ~&6504254477&~.regDisarm()
				}

				Timer {
					id: regReturnTimer
					interval: 1750
					repeat: false
					onTriggered: {
						if (~&6504254477&~.regReturnTo) {
							~&6504254477&~.regGoTo(~&6504254477&~.regReturnTo);
							~&6504254477&~.regReturnTo = "";
						}
						regBarTimer.restart();
					}
				}

				Timer {
					id: regBarTimer
					interval: 1750
					repeat: false
					onTriggered: ~&6504254477&~.regConfirmText = ""
				}

				Connections {
					target: ~&254540341572282132&~
					onRegCrossCancelChanged: {
						if (~&6504254477&~.regCrossActive) ~&6504254477&~.regCancelCross();
					}
				}

				Connections {
					target: ~&254540341572282132&~
					onRegOverviewClosedChanged: {
						if (~&6504254477&~.regCrossActive) regCrossCommitTimer.restart();
					}
				}

				Timer {
					id: regCrossCommitTimer
					interval: 400
					repeat: false
					onTriggered: ~&6504254477&~.regCommitCross()
				}

				Timer {
					id: regCrossArmTimer
					interval: 120
					repeat: false
					onTriggered: ~&6504254477&~.regCrossReady = true
				}

				Rectangle {
					id: regBackBar
					visible: ~&6504254477&~.regBackText !== ""
					z: 100004
					anchors.bottom: parent.bottom
					anchors.left: parent.left
					anchors.right: parent.right
					height: 115
					color: "#000000"
					Text {
						anchors.left: parent.left
						anchors.leftMargin: 40
						anchors.verticalCenter: parent.verticalCenter
						text: ~&6504254477&~.regBackText
						color: "#FFFFFF"
						font.pixelSize: 30
						font.bold: true
					}
					Rectangle {
						anchors.right: parent.right
						anchors.rightMargin: 24
						anchors.verticalCenter: parent.verticalCenter
						width: 160
						height: 70
						color: "#FFFFFF"
						Text { anchors.centerIn: parent; text: "Back"; color: "#000000"; font.pixelSize: 28; font.bold: true }
						MouseArea {
							anchors.fill: parent
							onClicked: {
								var b = ~&6504254477&~.regBackTarget;
								~&6504254477&~.regBackText = "";
								regBackTimer.stop();
								if (b && b.docId) {
									~&254540341572282132&~.regCrossJump = { targetPageKey: b.pageKey, linkId: "", back: null };
									var be = ~&233694067165438&~.~&8399431778896295215&~(b.docId);
									if (be) ~&254540341572282132&~.~&9497240032101537789&~(be, 0);
								}
							}
						}
					}
				}

				Timer {
					id: regBackTimer
					interval: 5000
					repeat: false
					onTriggered: ~&6504254477&~.regBackText = ""
				}

				Timer {
					id: regJumpTimer
					interval: 150
					repeat: false
					onTriggered: ~&6504254477&~.regTryJump()
				}

				Timer {
					id: regCrossReturnTimer
					interval: 1750
					repeat: false
					onTriggered: {
						var e = ~&233694067165438&~.~&8399431778896295215&~(~&6504254477&~.regCrossSrcDocId);
						if (e) ~&254540341572282132&~.~&9497240032101537789&~(e, ~&6504254477&~.regCrossSrcPageNum - 1);
					}
				}

				Rectangle {
					id: regConfirmBar
					visible: ~&6504254477&~.regConfirmText !== ""
					z: 100003
					anchors.top: parent.top
					anchors.left: parent.left
					anchors.right: parent.right
					height: 115
					color: "#000000"
					Text {
						anchors.centerIn: parent
						text: ~&6504254477&~.regConfirmText
						color: "#FFFFFF"
						font.pixelSize: 30
						font.bold: true
					}
				}

				Rectangle {
					id: regDialog
					visible: ~&6504254477&~.regDialogTitle !== ""
					z: 100020
					anchors.top: parent.top
					anchors.left: parent.left
					anchors.right: parent.right
					height: 520
					color: "#000000"
					Text {
						id: regDialogTitleText
						anchors.left: parent.left
						anchors.leftMargin: 60
						anchors.top: parent.top
						anchors.topMargin: 90
						text: ~&6504254477&~.regDialogTitle
						color: "#FFFFFF"
						font.pixelSize: 56
					}
					Text {
						anchors.left: parent.left
						anchors.leftMargin: 60
						anchors.top: regDialogTitleText.bottom
						anchors.topMargin: 30
						text: ~&6504254477&~.regDialogMsg
						color: "#FFFFFF"
						font.pixelSize: 30
					}
					Row {
						anchors.left: parent.left
						anchors.leftMargin: 60
						anchors.bottom: parent.bottom
						anchors.bottomMargin: 90
						spacing: 30
						Rectangle {
							width: 300
							height: 90
							color: "#FFFFFF"
							Text { anchors.centerIn: parent; text: "Cancel"; color: "#000000"; font.pixelSize: 30 }
							MouseArea {
								anchors.fill: parent
								onClicked: { ~&6504254477&~.regDialogTitle = ""; ~&6504254477&~.regDialogMsg = ""; ~&6504254477&~.regDialogLinkId = ""; }
							}
						}
						Rectangle {
							width: 300
							height: 90
							color: "#000000"
							border.color: "#FFFFFF"
							border.width: 2
							Text { anchors.centerIn: parent; text: "Delete entry"; color: "#FFFFFF"; font.pixelSize: 30 }
							MouseArea {
								anchors.fill: parent
								onClicked: {
									if (~&6504254477&~.regDialogLinkId !== "") ~&6504254477&~.regDeleteLink(~&6504254477&~.regDialogLinkId);
									~&6504254477&~.regDialogTitle = ""; ~&6504254477&~.regDialogMsg = ""; ~&6504254477&~.regDialogLinkId = "";
								}
							}
						}
					}
				}

			Repeater {
				model: ~&6504254477&~.regLinks
				delegate: Item {
					id: regMark
					visible: modelData.page === ~&6504254477&~.regCurKey && ~&6504254477&~.sceneView && !~&6504254477&~.sceneView.awaitingInitialTileSet && (~&6504254477&~.document ? ~&6504254477&~.document.pageCount : 0) >= 0 && (modelData.targetDoc ? true : (!modelData.target || ~&6504254477&~.regResolves(modelData.target)))
					opacity: modelData.targetDoc ? (~&233694067165438&~.~&8399431778896295215&~(modelData.targetDoc) ? 1.0 : 0.4) : (modelData.target ? 1.0 : 0.5)
					property point regViewPt: {
						var _a = ~&6504254477&~.leftViewportEdge;
						var _b = ~&6504254477&~.topViewportEdge;
						var _c = ~&6504254477&~.viewScale;
						var _d = ~&6504254477&~.regCurKey;
						return ~&6504254477&~.sceneToView(~&5971598&~.~&214638019283&~(modelData.sx, modelData.sy));
					}
					property real regZoom: {
						var _ = regViewPt;
						var ds = ~&6504254477&~.defaultScale;
						var tm = ~&6504254477&~.tileManager;
						if (ds && ds > 0 && tm && tm.scale > 0)
							return tm.scale / ds;
						var pa = ~&6504254477&~.sceneToView(~&5971598&~.~&214638019283&~(0, 0));
						var pb = ~&6504254477&~.sceneToView(~&5971598&~.~&214638019283&~(1000, 0));
						var d = pb.x - pa.x;
						return d > 0 ? (d / 1000) : 1;
					}
					width: 64 * regZoom
					height: 64 * regZoom
					x: regViewPt.x + 16 * regZoom
					y: regViewPt.y - height / 2

					Rectangle {
						anchors.fill: parent
						color: "transparent"
					}
					Image {
						anchors.centerIn: parent
						width: 48 * regZoom
						height: 48 * regZoom
						sourceSize.width: Math.round(48 * regZoom)
						sourceSize.height: Math.round(48 * regZoom)
						smooth: true
						source: modelData.targetDoc ? "qrc:/ark/icons/link" : "qrc:/ark/icons/page_hashtag"
					}
					MouseArea {
						id: regDiscMouse
						anchors.fill: parent
						property bool regLongFired: false
						onPressed: { regDiscMouse.regLongFired = false; regHoldTimer.restart(); }
						onReleased: regHoldTimer.stop()
						onCanceled: regHoldTimer.stop()
						onClicked: { if (!regDiscMouse.regLongFired) { if (modelData.targetDoc) ~&6504254477&~.regGoToCross(modelData); else if (modelData.target) ~&6504254477&~.regGoTo(modelData.target); } }
						Timer {
							id: regHoldTimer
							interval: 700
							repeat: false
							onTriggered: { regDiscMouse.regLongFired = true; ~&6504254477&~.regMenuId = modelData.id; }
						}
					}
				}
			}

			Item {
				id: regMenuLayer
				anchors.fill: parent
				visible: ~&6504254477&~.regMenuId !== "" && regMenuLayer.regMLink !== null && regMenuLayer.regMLink.page === ~&6504254477&~.regCurKey
				z: 100010

				property var regMLink: {
					var _m = ~&6504254477&~.regMenuId;
					var arr = ~&6504254477&~.regLinks;
					for (var i = 0; i < arr.length; i++) { if (arr[i].id === _m) return arr[i]; }
					return null;
				}
				property point regMPt: {
					var _a = ~&6504254477&~.leftViewportEdge;
					var _b = ~&6504254477&~.topViewportEdge;
					var _c = ~&6504254477&~.viewScale;
					var lk = regMLink;
					if (!lk) return ~&5971598&~.~&214638019283&~(0, 0);
					return ~&6504254477&~.sceneToView(~&5971598&~.~&214638019283&~(lk.sx, lk.sy));
				}
				property real regMZoom: {
					var _a = ~&6504254477&~.leftViewportEdge;
					var _b = ~&6504254477&~.topViewportEdge;
					var _c = ~&6504254477&~.viewScale;
					var ds = ~&6504254477&~.defaultScale;
					var tm = ~&6504254477&~.tileManager;
					if (ds && ds > 0 && tm && tm.scale > 0)
						return tm.scale / ds;
					var pa = ~&6504254477&~.sceneToView(~&5971598&~.~&214638019283&~(0, 0));
					var pb = ~&6504254477&~.sceneToView(~&5971598&~.~&214638019283&~(1000, 0));
					var d = pb.x - pa.x;
					return d > 0 ? (d / 1000) : 1;
				}

				MouseArea {
					anchors.fill: parent
					onClicked: ~&6504254477&~.regMenuId = ""
				}

				Rectangle {
					id: regMenuBar
					visible: regMenuLayer.regMLink !== null
					color: "#FFFFFF"
					border.color: "#000000"
					border.width: 2
					radius: 0
					width: regMenuRow.width + 28
					height: regMenuRow.height + 20
					x: Math.max(8, Math.min(regMenuLayer.width - width - 8, regMenuLayer.regMPt.x + 48 * regMenuLayer.regMZoom - width / 2))
					y: Math.max(8, Math.min(regMenuLayer.height - height - 8, regMenuLayer.regMPt.y + 32 * regMenuLayer.regMZoom + 14))

					Row {
						id: regMenuRow
						anchors.centerIn: parent
						spacing: 20
						Item {
							width: 60
							height: 60
							Image {
								anchors.centerIn: parent
								width: 52
								height: 52
								sourceSize.width: 52
								sourceSize.height: 52
								smooth: true
								source: "qrc:/ark/icons/dots_three_vertical"
							}
							MouseArea {
								anchors.fill: parent
								onClicked: ~&6504254477&~.regEditLink(regMenuLayer.regMLink ? regMenuLayer.regMLink.id : "")
							}
						}
						Item {
							width: 60
							height: 60
							Image {
								anchors.centerIn: parent
								width: 52
								height: 52
								sourceSize.width: 52
								sourceSize.height: 52
								smooth: true
								source: "qrc:/ark/icons/trashcan"
							}
							MouseArea {
								anchors.fill: parent
								onClicked: ~&6504254477&~.regDeleteLink(regMenuLayer.regMLink ? regMenuLayer.regMLink.id : "")
							}
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	END TRAVERSE
	TRAVERSE ?#[[18399528329672988301]]
	LOCATE AFTER ALL
	INSERT {
		onRegLinkAdd: {
			var r = ~&18399528329672988301&~.sceneSelectionRect;
			~&6504254477&~.regArmLink(r.x + r.width, r.y + r.height / 2);
		}
		onRegLinkAddCross: {
			var r = ~&18399528329672988301&~.sceneSelectionRect;
			~&6504254477&~.regArmLinkCross(r.x + r.width, r.y + r.height / 2, "");
		}
	}
	END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
AFFECT [[3197972396468700595]]
	TRAVERSE ?#[[10742505294233322867]]
	LOCATE BEFORE [[197082485]]
	INSERT {
		signal regLinkAdd
		signal regLinkAddCross
	}
	END TRAVERSE
	TRAVERSE ?#[[214642769434]]
		LOCATE BEFORE [[425121728314878811.16765000136167945189.7081261925573]]#[[3012293087768835154]]
		INSERT {
			~&425121728314878811&~.~&16765000136167945189&~.~&7081261925573&~ {
				~&5972374&~: regLinkAddBtn
				~&481641799955318521&~: ~&5971598&~.~&233696851602406&~
				~&6504337259&~: ~&214642769434&~.~&6504337259&~
				~&8399601734642709923&~: "qrc:/ark/icons/page_hashtag"
				~&254542236275632405&~: ~&10742505294233322867&~.regLinkAdd()
			}
			~&425121728314878811&~.~&16765000136167945189&~.~&7081261925573&~ {
				~&5972374&~: regLinkAddCrossBtn
				~&481641799955318521&~: ~&5971598&~.~&233696851602406&~
				~&6504337259&~: ~&214642769434&~.~&6504337259&~
				~&8399601734642709923&~: ~&"15094524446771853950&~
				~&254542236275632405&~: ~&10742505294233322867&~.regLinkAddCross()
			}
		}
	END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
AFFECT [[8850026134298937527]]
	TRAVERSE [[8397993708429497603]]
	LOCATE BEFORE ALL
	INSERT {
		property bool regLinkPickMode: false
		property int regOverviewClosed: 0
		property var regCrossPick: null
		property var regCrossPending: null
		property var regCrossJump: null
		property var regCrossError: null
		property int regCrossCancel: 0
	}
	LOCATE AFTER [[1046376476496319351]]#[[18307259815317701968]]
	INSERT {
		~&1046376476496319351&~ {
			~&5972374&~: regCrossPickHeader
			~&233748328658231&~: ~&254540341572282132&~.regCrossPick !== null && ~&254540341572282132&~.regCrossPick.phase === "browse"
			~&214646099849&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&214646099849&~
			~&214642559243&~: ~&6504222003&~("Select a document to link")
			~&8561446866773398043&~: {
				var p = ~&254540341572282132&~.regCrossPick;
				~&254540341572282132&~.regCrossPick = null;
				try { if (p && p.srcDocId) { var e = ~&233694067165438&~.~&8399431778896295215&~(p.srcDocId); if (e) ~&254540341572282132&~.~&9497240032101537789&~(e, p.srcPageNum - 1); } }
				catch (err) {  }
			}
		}
	}
	END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
AFFECT [[4530443761526121003]]
	TRAVERSE [[8397788359424131273]]
	LOCATE AFTER ALL
	INSERT {
		~&425121728314878811&~.~&254477135848310940&~ {
			~&5972374&~: regLinkPickHeader
			~&233748328658231&~: ~&254540341572282132&~.regLinkPickMode || (~&254540341572282132&~.regCrossPick !== null && ~&254540341572282132&~.regCrossPick.phase === "page")
			~&214646099849&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&214646099849&~
			~&180995&~: 50
			~&214642559243&~: "Tap a page to link"
			~&15212200941981406061&~: [
				~&425121728314878811&~.~&254477135848310940&~.~&7081261925573&~ {
					~&6504315758&~: ~&6504222003&~(~&"7081277108079&~)
					~&254542236275632405&~: { if (~&254540341572282132&~.regCrossPick !== null) ~&254540341572282132&~.regCrossCancel = ~&254540341572282132&~.regCrossCancel + 1; else ~&254540341572282132&~.regLinkPickMode = false; }
				},
				~&6502786168&~ { ~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~ },
				~&425121728314878811&~.~&254477135848310940&~.~&7081261925573&~ {
					~&8399601734642709923&~: ~&"15094524446771854124&~
					~&254542236275632405&~: ~&13155146558357480555&~.~&7082453764421&~ = !~&13155146558357480555&~.~&7082453764421&~
				}
			]
		}
		Connections {
			target: ~&254540341572282132&~
			onRegLinkPickModeChanged: {
				if (~&254540341572282132&~.regLinkPickMode) ~&13155146558357480555&~.~&7082453764421&~ = ~&214625660372&~;
			}
		}
		Connections {
			target: ~&214637513689&~
			function ~&13733777459642361598&~() {
				if (!~&214637513689&~.~&233748328658231&~ && (~&254540341572282132&~.regLinkPickMode || (~&254540341572282132&~.regCrossPick !== null && ~&254540341572282132&~.regCrossPick.phase === "page")))
					~&254540341572282132&~.regOverviewClosed = ~&254540341572282132&~.regOverviewClosed + 1;
			}
		}
	}
	END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
